input.command:
python3 << 'EOF'
import json, glob
arts=[]
for f in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/01/03/*.jsonl')):
    arts += [json.loads(l) for l in open(f)]
print(len(arts))
with open('memory/titles_0103.txt','w') as out:
    for a in arts: out.write(f"{a['source']} | {a['title']}\n")
EOF
grep -i -E "aleppo|sdf|syria" memory/titles_0103.txt | head -8; echo ---; grep -i -E "immigration|ice |operation|minneapolis|new orleans" memory/titles_0103.txt | head -10; echo ---; grep -i -E "world cup.*host|exclude|boycott petition" memory/titles_0103.txt | head -5; echo ---; grep -i -E "greenland|denmark" memory/titles_0103.txt | head -5; echo ---; grep -i -E "nfl|playoff" memory/titles_0103.txt | head -6
